Package com.sbdc.loggerhead

Class Loggerhead

java.lang.Object
com.sbdc.loggerhead.Loggerhead
public class Loggerhead extends Object
Singleton that orchestrates all logging. The entry-point of the library

    • getInstance

      public static Loggerhead getInstance()
      Returns:
      Loggerhead instance

    • initializeLogging

      public void initializeLogging()
      Initializes logging framework by starting DataLogManager, disabling default logging of NetworkTables, and hooking up the driver station logging

    • addCompoundLogger

      public Loggerhead addCompoundLogger(CompoundLogger compoundLogger)
      Add a compound logger to this Loggerhead instance. Note the compound logger must be initalized. See CompoundLogger.initialize(String)
      Parameters:
      compoundLogger - the CompoundLogger
      Returns:
      Loggerhead instance for chaining

    • applyToConfigurator

      public Loggerhead applyToConfigurator(Consumer<Configurator> applyTo)
      Parameters:
      applyTo - callable that recieves the Configurator
      Returns:
      Loggerhead instance for chaining

    • getConfigurator

      public Configurator getConfigurator()

    • cleanLoggers

      public void cleanLoggers()
      Clean all primary logger objects, compound logger objects, and tables. Primary use is reconfiguration. Called automatically by Configurator every configuration

    • update

      public void update()
      Update all loggers. Must be called often, such as every robotPeriodic, usually 20 milliseconds.

    • getDataLog

      public DataLog getDataLog()
      Returns:
      The DataLog instance Loggerhead is using

    • getNetworkTableInstance

      public NetworkTableInstance getNetworkTableInstance()
      Returns:
      The NetworkTable instance Loggerhead is using
